title: AuditEvent
description: A single audit event record written to the Guardian CNPG audit_events table by AuditWriter implementations. guardian-schema.md §17.

ClusterID.description: Identifier of the cluster where the event originated.

SequenceNumber.description: Monotonic event sequence number. Used for deduplication with ClusterID.

Subject.description: Identity of the principal performing the action.

Resource.description: Name of the resource the action targets.

MatchedPolicy.description: Name of the RBACPolicy or rule that produced the decision. Optional.

LineageIndexRef.description: Reference to the InfrastructureLineageIndex governing the root declaration associated with this event. Optional -- absent for platform-wide events not associated with a specific root declaration.
